mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, message, channel, status, sent_at, read_at, metadata, created_at, updated_at FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{page.size} OFFSET #{page.offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET type = #{type}, title = #{title}, message = #{message}, channel = #{channel}, status = #{status}, sent_at = #{sentAt}, read_at = #{readAt}, metadata = #{metadata}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notifications SET status = 'READ', read_at = #{readAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delivered_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'READ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as read_count FROM notifications WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE(#{date})

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'SENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sent_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as delivered_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'READ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as read_count FROM notifications WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = #{year} AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) = #{month}
